TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cikowa‚Äôay, title = Cikowa‚Äôay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cikowa‚Äôay} }

S.FORM: Cikowa'ay Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Cikowa'ay a niyaro', 163 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 433 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 34% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 147 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 66% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 286 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 32%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ¶iko~uwa °aj itiniaj i ¶ńßisńßaŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ¶iko~uwa °aj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Cikowa'ay Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Cikowa'ay a niyaro', 163 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 433 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 34% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 147 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 66% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 286 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 32%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
